summary: Iteration 8 verified the Trust Score feature end-to-end. Backend + frontend both green after fixing a critical missing import (MasterQuestionBank) that was crashing the entire React app. 4/4 backend tests pass; Trust column, colored badges, em-dashes and DESC sort all render correctly in HRApplications.
action_items: None for Trust Score feature — verified working.

OPTIONAL: React console warning 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' seen on HR login redirect — likely a setState-in-render inside AuthContext/HRLogin. Non-blocking but worth cleaning up.
OPTIONAL: HR /hr/applications shows 167 rows in one large table — no pagination. Not part of this feature but may hurt perf at scale.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL (FIXED by test agent): /app/frontend/src/App.js referenced <MasterQuestionBank /> in a Route (line 64) but the component was NEVER imported. This ReferenceError crashed the entire SPA at boot — every route including HR login threw 'MasterQuestionBank is not defined'. Fixed by adding `import MasterQuestionBank from "@/pages/MasterQuestionBank";`.
compute_trust_score is defensive against ZeroDivisionError (empty auto_tasks path taken) and math checks out: MCQ 100% + AI 100 + proctoring 100 with 0-pass coding yields 30+0+25+15 = 70 as observed.
server.py is now 1133 lines — approaching the >700-line refactor threshold. Consider splitting HR/candidate/exam routers into modules.

Trust breakdown returns coding=None when no auto-graded tasks; frontend HRApplications currently only reads the top-level trust_score, so this is fine, but any UI that renders the breakdown must guard for null coding.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test candidates + applications + submissions on an open job to seed trust_score values: one high (trust=70, amber) and one low (trust=25, red, 5 violations). Test data uses emails prefixed 'trust_<uuid>@example.com'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust Score is fully validated. Backend: POST /api/exam/submit returns trust_score (int 0-100) + trust_breakdown{mcq,coding,ai_safety,proctoring}; applications denormalize trust_score; GET /api/hr/applications is default-sorted by trust DESC with nulls last. Frontend HRApplications.jsx renders <span data-testid=trust-<appId>> with color thresholds (>=75 green, >=50 amber, else red) and em-dash for no submission. Do NOT re-verify prior iterations; the earlier crash from missing MasterQuestionBank import has been fixed here.
rca of the issue: React SPA boot crash — root cause: /app/frontend/src/App.js line 64 rendered <MasterQuestionBank /> inside a <Route>, but there was no matching import statement. React encountered an undefined component reference at initial render, throwing 'MasterQuestionBank is not defined' at the App component before any Route matched, breaking the whole SPA (HR login page could not even mount its form fields). Repro: load any URL — red error overlay appears. Fix: added `import MasterQuestionBank from "@/pages/MasterQuestionBank";` after the MasterUsers import. Verified by full HR login + HRApplications render including Trust column.
